content: Captain Scarlett and Her Pirate's Booty
name: Manly Man Shield
description: A rare Torgue shield. It functions like a normal shield, but has a penalty: you take increased elemental damage.
notes: Its melee bonus adds explosive damage equal to 40 percent of your character's base melee damage, and it does not scale with melee skills, relics, or weapon effects. If passed to Deathtrap using Sharing is Caring, the base melee scaling does not transfer correctly, so the added explosive damage is very small and usually negligible. The red text is a nod to the film In and Out.

special.description: Melee attacks deal extra explosive damage equal to 40 percent of base melee damage. Curse of the Elementals: increased elemental damage taken. What a fabulous window treatment.
special.title: What a fabulous window treatment. Curse of the Elementals!

abilities: Adds bonus explosive damage to all melee attacks. SIO IBIS
